mapper.sql: id, title, content, type, status, creator, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM announcement WHERE deleted = 0
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.title}, '%')
AND creator LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.creator}, '%')
AND type = #{query.type}
SELECT FROM announcement WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement (title, content, type, status, creator, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{status}, #{creator}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE announcement SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, type = #{type}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE announcement SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE announcement SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM announcement_read WHERE announcement_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM announcement_read WHERE announcement_id = #{id}
